component.name: NeuroPrompt Semantic Compiler
component.summary: Compile human prompts into structured semantic outputs for AI

description.p: NeuroPrompt Semantic Compiler is an offline desktop and CLI tool that preserves the original prompt, generates canonical NSL, hybrid Markdown, machine-oriented JSON and context-loss validation reports.
It supports FAST, STANDARD, ADVANCED, ROP, RESEARCH_MAX and AUTO semantic compilation profiles.
